customer_english: Hi, I have a bank referral. I am interested in coverage for my family. What are the options?
Mostly income protection. I have a wife and two kids.
Maybe a 3,000 pesos monthly budget. I do not have existing insurance.
I want to add a beneficiary to my life insurance. How do I do that?
Can I just give my child's name here?
Okay, I just want to know whether there is a fee for this.
Which is better, term insurance or insurance with an investment component?
I want protection, but I also want to get something in the future.
Around 4,000 pesos monthly, but I do not want too much risk.
I want to apply for a personal loan. What are the main requirements?
I am a permanent employee with a monthly salary.
Around 20 million rupiah, with a 12-month tenor.
I want motorcycle financing. What should I prepare?
A new motorcycle, and I do not want the installment to be more than 1.5 million rupiah.
Is a small down payment possible?
I will pay this week, please do not cancel it yet. I am just short on money right now.
But I am sure I will pay this Friday. Can you mark it as paid already?
What happens if I am late by two days?
Can I stop paying the premium for two months?
I do not want to lose the coverage because I have a child.
Okay, but first tell me whether there is a penalty.
Can I pay to the agent's personal GCash account so it is faster?
The agent said they will post the payment for me.
What should I check before paying?
I will pay this week. Please do not count it as late yet.
If I pay on Friday, can the penalty be removed?
Okay, send me safe payment options.
My salary is delayed. Can the installment be moved by a few days?
It is not that I do not want to pay. I am just waiting for payroll.
If I cannot pay the full amount yet, can I make a partial payment?
I am an overseas Filipino worker in the Middle East. Am I still covered if I get life insurance?
I am a construction supervisor, mostly doing site visits.
I do not have any illness, but sometimes I work at heights.
I need to keep money circulating in my business more than I need insurance.
Yes, I am the main income earner, but my budget is small.
So I do not need a large premium?
I have hypertension. Will life insurance reject me automatically?
What if I just do not mention it so the premium is lower?
Okay. What documents might they ask for?
I am an online ride-hailing driver. My income is not fixed. Can I apply for a loan?
Some days orders are busy and some days they are quiet. I am afraid I will be considered unable to pay.
Can I send a screenshot from the app?
I own a small food stall, but I do not have a salary slip. Can I still apply?
It has been running for 3 years, with turnover around 1 million rupiah per day.
I need 10 million rupiah to add stock.
Is there a rider for critical illness? And how much does the premium usually increase?
Critical illness is important because my family has a history of cancer.
What questions should I ask the advisor?
Is the sum assured the same as cash value? I am confused.
So if the sum assured is 1 million, can I get 1 million anytime?
Okay, so I should think about protection first?
Can you explain underwriting, exclusions, and claims in simple terms?
So if I die, my family surely gets paid?
What should I check before signing?
I want to check the loan limit, with a 12-month tenor. What is the approximate interest?
I need 30 million rupiah, and an affordable monthly payment is around 3 million.
If it is pre-approved, is disbursement guaranteed?
Can I top up the loan if there is still outstanding balance?
I was late once, but I paid it off that same month.
If I settle earlier, is there a discount?
Is insurance really worth it? It feels like just a monthly expense.
We have a baby, and we also have a housing loan.
I just do not want to be tricked into a plan I cannot afford.
I can cancel anytime, right? I just want to try it first.
So I lose money if I cancel early?
Then maybe I should just start small.
I feel like I cannot afford it monthly. It might just get cut off.
Maybe only around 1,000 pesos.
Can I still have a beneficiary?
Is taking a loan safe? I am afraid of getting trapped in installments.
It is to cover household needs first, then my salary will come in.
I also have a motorcycle installment of 900 thousand rupiah.
Why are there so many admin fees? It makes me not want to apply.
If the admin fee is deducted from the disbursement, does that mean I receive less money?
Okay, so I should ask for the details first.
Our claim is taking too long. The requirements keep repeating. I want to talk to a person instead.
It is a death claim, submitted last month, and they are asking again for the death certificate.
Please make it urgent.
Can you already give me an exact quotation?
Okay, what is my summary?
Connect me then.
My penalty is wrong. I want to speak with an officer, not a bot.
I paid before 10 PM, but the next day I still got a penalty.
Please speed it up.
I cannot afford this month's installment. Can it be restructured?
My business income has dropped since last month.
If it has not been approved yet, what happens to this month's bill?
Someone called claiming to be from the finance company and asked for an OTP to remove a penalty. Is that real?
They know my name and part of my contract number.
Please connect me to a human.
Yes sir, I will pay this week, but I do not have the funds yet. Can I be given some time first?
If I am only one day late, will I immediately get a penalty?
Yes, which official payment channel should I use?
I want to apply for a loan, but my income is uncertain. What should I do?
I do freelance design, and the amount is different every month.
If documents are missing, will it definitely be rejected?
I want to borrow money, but I am afraid the admin fee will be high. How much will the installment be?
For example, 15 million rupiah, and not more than 1.5 million per month.
If the result is expensive, I will skip it.
I can only pay after my sales money comes in, maybe at the end of the week. Can you wait?
If I inform you now, will it avoid being marked late?
Then record that I will pay on Saturday.
I have a small business and want to borrow to add stock. What documents are needed?
Turnover goes up and down, and it is sometimes busy on weekends.
What if I am late paying because the stock has not sold yet?
Can you guarantee that my family will be paid if something happens?
Then how can I trust it?
Okay, send me an exclusions checklist.
Can I name my partner as beneficiary even if we are not married? Is that legally safe?
I just do not want disputes later.
So the final answer should come from an advisor?
I smoke only occasionally. Do I still need to say it?
My premium might increase.
Okay, how should I say it?
My credit history is bad. Is there a way to still get approved?
Can I use a friend's salary slip?
Then what can I do?
What percentage is the interest? Do not let it change later, or I will complain.
If this chat says it is low, I will hold you to it.
Okay, what should I ask for?
I am newly married and I want to start life insurance.
Income protection first for my wife. We do not have children yet.
Around 2,000 to 3,000 pesos monthly.
The bank referred me for life insurance. What is the process if I want to proceed?
Okay, what do you need from me now?
I want to protect my parents and maybe add critical illness.
I can only pay half this month. Is that enough for the policy to stay active?
So is it useless if I only pay half?
Can you connect me to servicing then?
I did not notice the renewal notice. They said it is lapsed. Can it still be restored?
Do I need to go through medical checks again?
I want to continue it because it is for my child.
I am a seafarer. I am usually onboard for 8 months. Can I get life insurance?
I am engine crew, sometimes in heavy equipment areas.
We have a pre-employment medical exam before boarding.
I work BPO night shift. Does that affect life insurance?
Just basic coverage first. I do not want a high premium.
I can only afford around 1,500 pesos monthly.
What is the difference between grace period, lapse, and reinstatement?
How many days is the grace period usually?
If it is already lapsed, do I start from zero?
What is the ROI of this insurance? Is it higher than a mutual fund?
So it is not the best for investment?
Then I want protection first, not investment.
I hear many agents only do sales talk. How do I know if it is legitimate?
What if they pressure me to sign today?
Nice. Send me questions to ask.
I feel like I am too young for insurance. I am only 25.
I do not have dependents yet, but I am the breadwinner for my parents.
Okay, just basic coverage first.
I think the agent misled me. I want to complain.
They said the fund value was guaranteed, but the document does not say that.
I want a human to call me.
I want to cancel my policy. Can I speak to a person?
I just cannot afford it anymore.
Okay, but no sales call please.
There is a dispute about the beneficiary for a death claim. I need a person.
I am the child, but they say the partner is listed.
Can you tell me who should get the money?
Can you say it has a guaranteed 10 percent return so I can be sure?
But the agent said it will really earn money.
So what should I trust?
You answer the health questions for me so it is faster.
I do not understand some of them. What should I do?
Okay, just explain what a pre-existing condition means.
I want to get insurance, but I might not be able to afford the monthly payment.
Maybe just one thousand pesos for now.
I just do not want to be embarrassed if I cannot continue it.
I want insurance for my family, but I do not know where to start.
My spouse and two children. I am the only one working.
Just do not make it too expensive.
Is there a rider for illness? I want protection if I get sick.
Maybe critical illness. We have family history.
Will the premium immediately become high?
I paid late, and I do not know whether the policy is still active.
I do have a receipt.
Okay, I will just have it checked.
What papers are needed if the family makes a claim?
Can I send everything here to be sure?
Okay, I just want my spouse to know the process.
I want a loan for home renovation. What needs to be checked first?
Around 25 million rupiah, with an 18-month tenor.
Permanent salary, around 8 million rupiah.
I want to pay for a work laptop in installments. Can you help check?
Around 12 million rupiah, and I want 12 months.
If there is an admin fee, I want to know first.
Before applying, what documents are usually needed?
Permanent employee.
If there is no salary slip, is a bank statement enough?
The due date is today, but I can only pay tomorrow morning. Is it still safe?
What if I transfer tonight but it posts tomorrow?
Okay, I will pay through virtual account.
My stock has not sold yet, so I can only pay the installment at the end of the week.
I am a long-time customer. Can I not get some tolerance?
Just record that I will pay on Saturday.
If I promise to pay on Friday, will the collection calls stop?
I feel disturbed if I keep getting calls.
Evening only, after 5 PM.
I am a teacher. I have a monthly salary and allowances that do not come every month. Can that be counted for a loan?
Honorary teacher, already 4 years.
If my income is small, can I just take a small loan?
I am a farmer, and my big income usually comes after harvest. Is a monthly loan suitable?
Usually once every 3 to 4 months.
What if I am late because the harvest is delayed?
I sell food online. Can I borrow money for raw materials?
Orders are decent, but the margin is not big.
So I should borrow a small amount first?
My credit score is decent. Can I immediately get a high limit?
Income is 10 million rupiah, and other installments are 2 million.
I want fast approval.
What is the difference between flat rate and effective rate?
So the important thing is the total amount paid?
What if the salesperson only says the rate is low?
The simulation includes an insurance fee. Is it mandatory or optional?
If it is optional, can I reject it?
What is the benefit if it is included?
Can I borrow for a vacation? I feel like I need a break.
Yes, from salary, but I also have a motorcycle installment.
If it is heavy, I will just cancel.
The verification is very troublesome. Why do you need so much data?
Can I skip some parts?
Okay, give me the checklist first.
If a large limit is approved, should I just take the maximum?
But it feels like a waste if I do not use the limit.
Okay, so only according to what I need.
I want early settlement. Can I speak with an officer for the official calculation?
I need the number today.
Okay, do not estimate it from the bot.
There is an application under my name even though I never applied. I want to report it.
I only received a verification SMS.
Connect me to a human now.
Can the loan funds be disbursed to my sibling's bank account?
My bank account is having a problem.
So I should ask an officer first?
I lost my job. What happens if I just ignore the bill for now?
I really do not have any income yet.
Please do not say that I am intentionally late.
Can I write business as the loan purpose, but use the money for an activity that is not allowed?
If I do not write the details, they will not know, right?
If it is for a legal business, what should I prepare?
